General.Name: Meihao Medical Group Co. Ltd.
General.Description: Meihao Medical Group Co., Ltd, an investment holding company, provides dental services to individuals in Mainland China. The company offers general, reparative, implant, orthodontics, and cosmetic dentistry services. It also owns and operates private dental hospitals and clinic. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Wenzhou, the People's Republic of China.
